REPRODUCE.description: Discover up to one card from a certain number of cards.
REPRODUCE.title: Reproduce
FIELD.description: A global effect, only one can be active at a time.
FIELD.title: Field Card
LJSK.description: Cards from the spacetime you are currently linked to will appear.
LJSK.title: Linked Spacetime
FSK.title: Pan-Spacetime
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_BINDING.descrip: After being played, returns to your hand next turn.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_BINDING.title: Binding
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_COMBAT_SKILL.de: Treats the effect as the specific effect, and performs the corresponding action on the target of the action.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_SOULBINDING.des: After being played, returns to your hand.
WXC.description:
Positive Emotion: Playing an attack card and dealing unblocked attack damage +1, winning a clash +2, completely blocking an attack +1, minion death +2, enemy death +5.
Negative Emotion: Taking unblocked attack damage +1, losing a clash +2, summoned creature death +2, teammate death +5.
HP additionally affects Abnormality extraction probability.
WXC.title: Literature Floor
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_INDIVIDUAL.desc: Compete with the target's single attack value; the winner deals damage equal to the difference and triggers the target's Bleed.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_SUMMATION.descr: Compete using total attack damage; if you win, deal damage equal to the difference. No Emotion gain or counter damage is received.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_KEYWORD_SUMMATION.title: Summation
